title: They Found A Mysterious Shadow in the Ocean
description:
During World War II Navy sailors noticed something weird on their sonar. As it echoed down into the depths... a mysterious shadow pinged back. 

It was as large as the seafloor itself but it didn’t make any sense because it was only a couple hundred feet below them.

Conspiracy theories sprung up, but during the war, there was no time to investigate further. Years later, we found out it wasn’t a threat but some vital natural “engineering” keeping our planet healthy. 

To find out more, subscribe!

#ocean #deepsea #mystery #science #shorts
